title: Cuneiform Tablet #0154: Early Dynastic Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
